expo.name: AngkorGo
expo.description: Cambodia's everyday super-app — rides, mobile auto repair, vehicle rentals, stays, and food delivery, all in one. English, ភាសាខ្មែរ, 中文.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: AngkorGo uses your location to match you with nearby drivers, mechanics, and couriers, and to show live tracking during a trip or delivery.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Take photos of your vehicle, a problem, or a listing for your request.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Attach photos to your request or listing.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow AngkorGo to use your location to match and track your trips and deliveries.
